nasb.text: Therefore they spent a long time there speaking boldly with reliance upon the Lord, who was testifying to the word of His grace, granting that signs and wonders be done by their hands.

esv.text: So they remained for a long time, speaking boldly for the Lord, who bore witness to the word of his grace, granting signs and wonders to be done by their hands.

cnv.text: 兩人卻仍住了很久，靠著主放膽講論，主也藉著他們的手行神蹟奇事，證實他恩惠的道。

ccb.text: 二人在那里逗留了好些日子，靠着主勇敢地传道。主赐给他们行神迹奇事的能力，为祂的恩典之道做见证。

csbs.text: 于是保罗和巴拿巴就住了很久，靠着主放胆传道。主藉着他们的手行了神迹和奇事，见证了他恩典的话语。
